category_sources: source_facts.description says h2spec is a conformance testing tool for HTTP/2 implementation; official README repeats this purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is h2spec; official summerwind/h2spec README title is h2spec.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, flags, and build documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official h2spec README says it tests HTTP/2 implementations and is compliant with HTTP/2 and HPACK RFCs; official GitHub topics include go, http2, and hpack.
